description: Decorator metadata support + TS tuple label changes cascade across parser, generator, helpers, and plugin-decorators

changed_package.name: @babel/helper-create-class-features-plugin
changed_package.change_summary: Decorator metadata support added; also @babel/types updated for mixed labeled/unlabeled TS tuple elements

affected_dependents.name: @babel/helpers
affected_dependents.impact: New applyDecs2305 helper for decorator metadata

affected_dependents.name: @babel/plugin-proposal-decorators
affected_dependents.impact: Decorator transformer updated for metadata, new test fixtures added

affected_dependents.name: @babel/parser
affected_dependents.impact: Parser updated to allow mixed labeled/unlabeled TS tuple elements (PR #15896)

changelog_entries: @babel/parser: Allow TS tuples with both labeled and unlabeled elements (v7.23.0)
